title: crotalaria rhynchotropioides
intro: Crotalaria rhynchotropioides, also known as the 'Golden Bush' or 'Veldt Gold', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria rhynchotropioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
